case_title: CHANG KIM VS. ALEXANDER VILDERMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-28-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-18-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST CHANG KIM FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-27-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-13-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-07-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-27-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-10-2017 CONTINUED TO MAR-07-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). *** NOTE: IF NO APPEARANCE IS MADE ON MAR-07-2017, THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THE CASE. *** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-07-2017 AT 10:30 AM. PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B). THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-06-2016 CONTINUED TO MAY-18-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance. The Court ordered Case Dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608 (b).
Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2017 Continued To Mar-07-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Mar-07-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. If no appearance is made on Mar-07-2017, the court intends to dismiss the case. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2016 Continued To Jan-10-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff Chang Kim is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Jan-10-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: Appearance by self-represented Plaintiff, Chang Kim. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Sep-27-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)
